name: voicemeeter-raycast
title: Voicemeeter Control
description: Control Voicemeeter strips and buses from Raycast.
author: Vorm--

commands.name: mute
commands.title: Mute Channels
commands.subtitle: Voicemeeter
commands.description: Toggle, mute, or unmute Voicemeeter strips and buses.

commands.name: volume
commands.title: Adjust Volume
commands.subtitle: Voicemeeter
commands.description: Adjust Voicemeeter volume by quick steps or absolute values.

commands.name: connections
commands.title: Manage Connections
commands.subtitle: Voicemeeter
commands.description: Connect or disconnect strips to Voicemeeter buses.

commands.name: profiles
commands.title: Manage Profiles
commands.subtitle: Voicemeeter
commands.description: Create and apply Voicemeeter volume and mute profiles.

commands.name: status
commands.title: View Status
commands.subtitle: Voicemeeter
commands.description: Show Voicemeeter connection status and current target state.

preferences.name: muteBehavior
preferences.title: Mute Behavior
preferences.description: How mute actions behave when state may be stale.

preferences.name: voicemeeterExecutablePath
preferences.title: Voicemeeter Executable Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to voicemeeter executable for launch actions.

preferences.name: increaseStep
preferences.title: Volume Increase Step (dB)
preferences.description: dB to add when increasing volume.

preferences.name: decreaseStep
preferences.title: Volume Decrease Step (dB)
preferences.description: dB to subtract when decreasing volume.

preferences.name: volumePrimaryAction
preferences.title: Primary Hotkey (Enter)
preferences.description: Which action gets the Enter key. Secondary gets Ctrl+Enter.

preferences.name: sectionOrder
preferences.title: Section Order
preferences.description: Which section appears first in lists.
